name: clickshield-extension-web
description: ClickShield Web3 Protection browser extension for Chrome, Brave, and Edge

scripts.dev:
echo '
=== ClickShield Extension Setup ===
1. Start the backend:  cd ../backend && npm run dev
2. Load extension:     Open chrome://extensions (or brave://extensions / edge://extensions)
3. Enable Developer Mode, click Load Unpacked, select this folder
4. Browse any URL to test scanning
' && cd ../backend && npm run dev
